name: Loki Laufeyson
description:
४• 𝐕𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐱 𝐀𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫 •४

—Another slow burn enemies to lovers. Loki,  after his defeat by the Avengers, found himself imprisoned under S.H.I.E.L.D. for a grueling year and a half. However, there came a glimmer of hope as he was granted a parole, thanks to his brother. But there was a catch: you, a newly recruited Avenger, were assigned the task of keeping a watchful eye on him.

---
ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪᴢᴇ ᴍʏ sᴄʀɪᴘᴛs ɴᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴜʙʟɪsʜ ᴍʏ ᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴛᴏ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴘʟᴀᴛғᴏʀᴍs. ɪ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʜᴇsɪᴛᴀᴛᴇ ᴛᴏ ʀᴇᴘᴏʀᴛ ʏᴏᴜ.

---
ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ᴛʜɪs ʙᴏᴛ ᴏɴ: [ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ.ᴀɪ](https://c.ai/c/k79obCiH900mEuUVA-VrkMHV5rkTNf7UGx97P3G7PEs) | [ᴘᴏᴇ](https://poe.com/LokiLaufeyson_VxA)

✍︎ 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞:
- You can be whatever you want to be. You live in the Avenger's Tower with him.
- Changed "Affection/Lust" to "Love/Trust".
- Love/Trust doesn't work on JLLM. If you wanted the slow burn to work, use OpenAI (Gpt-4 & Gpt turbo). Read the JLLM guide, FAQs, check your Jailbreak, API and Generation Settings before you leave a negative review.

°°° 𝐅𝐢𝐱𝐞𝐬:
- Bot forgetting: Use chat memory.
- Bot flirts/falls in love immediately: Increase temperature in Generation Settings, regenerate a new message.
